posts.author: BruceGosk (Bruce Gosk)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi everyone! Bruce here from Mint Consulting Australia.

As the monday.com Practice Lead at Mint, I’ve supported a range of clients, including nonprofits and small to large enterprises. My work has included quick workflow tune-ups and training, as well as a 6-month agile project with over 300 hours of work that launched a new division with 150 users.

Making things easy and intuitive for users is always my priority. I especially enjoy ongoing projects with weekly catch-ups, where I can continue improving complex workflows over time, guided by new monday.com features and real client feedback.

Your first consult is always FREE. You can book a time with me here, or email me at bruce@mintconsulting.org. I’m also happy to visit you on-site if you’re based in the Gold Coast Region!
